bullets: Christians in China facing ongoing raids, mass detentions, forced interrogation, and escalating criminal charges against house church leaders and members.
Over 1,400 Christians killed and 1,800 abducted in Nigeria within 96 days amid relentless jihadist and militant violence and reported government inaction.
Young Christians in Laos held for six months after refusing to renounce their faith, amid a wider pattern of expulsions of Christian families.
Believers in North Korea imprisoned indefinitely in political prison camps since 2001 for possessing a Bible, with no known release.
Pakistani Christians acquitted after years of wrongful imprisonment under blasphemy laws, amid continued vulnerability to misuse of those laws.
At least 36 civilians in Afghanistan, including women and children, killed and over 160 wounded in cross-border airstrikes amid escalating tensions with Pakistan.
Civilians across Ukraine in multiple cities killed and wounded in ongoing Russian missile and drone strikes targeting residential and energy infrastructure.
Palestinian civilians in Gaza facing continued airstrikes, displacement camp conditions of sewage and rats, and worsening humanitarian crisis.
Palestinian farming families in the occupied West Bank losing land, livestock, and livelihoods amid bulldozing and settler attacks.
Nearly 3,000 civilian victims in eastern Congo, including hundreds of women and children, suffering unlawful killings, sexual violence, and forced recruitment.
Civilians in Sudan's El Obeid facing imminent ground offensive, ongoing drone strikes, and a rapidly deteriorating humanitarian situation.
Displaced and vulnerable civilians in Lebanon amid continued military activity, unresolved ceasefire, and over 1.2 million people unable to return to destroyed homes.
Civilians in Syria caught in ongoing military incursions, drone and missile strikes, and targeted persecution of vulnerable communities under the new government.
About 11,000 seafarers stranded in the Persian Gulf for months aboard ships under ongoing threat of attack in the Strait of Hormuz.
Communities across Nigeria facing armed kidnappings, student abductions during school exams, and civilian killings by armed groups.
Doctors, nurses, patients, and civilians in Myanmar facing repeated military airstrikes on healthcare facilities and civilian areas.
Aid workers and convoy passengers in South Sudan killed and wounded in an ambush on a humanitarian convoy.
Civilians in Somalia caught between political crisis, gunfights in the capital, and ongoing military operations against armed groups.
Displaced families in Haiti, including women and children, sheltering in makeshift camps amid gang violence and sexual assault.
Thousands of African migrants in South Africa, particularly Malawians, facing anti-foreigner attacks and forced displacement with loss of livelihoods.
Residents of Bahrain and crews aboard ships in the Persian Gulf struck by drone attacks amid regional escalation.
Civilians in Yemen's Al Jawf wounded in an armed ambush amid continued conflict.
Civilians and security forces near the Kenya-Somalia border following an armed attack on a security camp.
Six shelter staff killed and the women and children they served in Germany following a targeted attack on a refuge facility.
Civilians in Colombia caught between military operations and armed group activity amid a declared offensive.
Communities in Mexico's Oaxaca region facing rising political violence and targeted killings of local officials.
Three people wounded, including a couple in critical condition, in a deliberate bombing at a residential building in Monaco.
Thousands of protesters in Serbia and Albania engaged in prolonged demonstrations over governance and political accountability.
Civilians in Senegal amid political tensions and street clashes following a constitutional amendment vote.
Civilians in the Philippines, including a young volunteer teacher, killed in an armed ambush.
Residents of Chicago's most affected neighborhoods amid ongoing gun violence leaving multiple people shot and killed.
47 officials detained in Baghdad amid an anti-corruption crackdown raising concerns over rule of law and due process.
Venezuela facing mass casualties, collapsed buildings, and tens of thousands missing after two major earthquakes struck the northern coast

Communities across the Democratic Republic of Congo and neighboring Uganda amid a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak with over 1,200 infected, hundreds dead, and nearly two million displaced people cut off from medical care
Families across the United States grieving deaths from flash flooding in Kentucky, wildfires along the Colorado-Utah border, and evacuations from multiple states including Washington and Colorado
Residents of Canada's Manitoba and Northwest Territories displaced by fast-moving wildfires threatening remote communities
Elderly and vulnerable people across Europe — especially in France and Germany — dying during a prolonged heatwave with over 1,300 excess deaths recorded
People of Madagascar recovering from a deadly cyclone that killed at least 20 and injured dozens
Residents across Japan recovering from twin typhoons that triggered landslides, flooding, and mass evacuations affecting over two million people
Families and workers across India facing multiple monsoon landslides blocking roads, injuring laborers, and causing fatalities in mountain regions
Flood-affected residents of Ghana's capital amid submerged neighborhoods, power outages, and emergency response failures
Residents of Russia's Kamchatka region facing dangerous river flooding threatening communities along the Kamchatka River
Myanmar's jade mining communities grieving workers buried and killed in a landslide at one of the world's largest mining sites
Unvaccinated children and families across the United States amid a rapidly growing measles outbreak spanning dozens of jurisdictions
Residents of Belgium facing a cluster of mpox cases in an urban setting with rising concern among health authorities
Communities across Congo suffering acute humanitarian needs within active Ebola zones compounded by ongoing conflict and displacement
